purpose: Define admin/ops postulation management queues, grouping, approval decisions, date adjustment requests, confirmation requests, reschedule requests and notification fallback strategy.

branchView: show all postulations for the same branch/visit
show Q1/Q2 or period split when relevant
show available slots or duplicate risks
shopperView: show all postulations from same shopper
show if shopper applied to multiple visits
show where there are fewer applicants

approveForDifferentPeriodOrVisit.notes: Example: approve one shopper for Q1 and another for Q2 when project rules allow.

softNotSelected.notes: Do not send harsh rejected wording when the shopper was simply not selected this time.

rules: When Make/API messaging is disabled, prepare WhatsApp Web message and in-app notification.
All notifications must record intended channel and delivery status when runtime is enabled later.
Approval notification must include who approved internally for audit, not necessarily visible to shopper unless configured.
Not-selected messaging must be soft and encourage applying to other visits when appropriate.
Request date adjustment and confirmation must include clear reason and requested action.

duplicatePrevention: Once a postulation is approved and active assignment exists, the visit must leave available/approval queue for other ops users.
Other pending postulations for same visit must be marked not_selected_soft or pending alternate period/manual review according to admin decision.
Do not allow two ops users to approve the same visit silently.
Use visitId/hrRowId/assignmentId, not branch name only.

newLessons: How to compare postulations by branch
How to compare postulations by shopper
How to request a date adjustment
How to ask for date confirmation
How to approve without duplicate work
How to send soft not-selected messages

hardStops: Do not send real WhatsApp API from this contract.
Do not call Make from this contract.
Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not use harsh rejection wording for not selected shoppers unless true ineligible/rejected case.
Do not allow duplicate approval for the same visit.
